title: Migrating Data out of Monday Dev
excerpt:
Is there a way to migrate boards out of Monday Dev app into workspace? 
Thanks!

posts.author: mmmmonday (Mel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to migrate boards out of Monday Dev app into workspace?

Thanks!

posts.author: Ranto (Ran Toueg)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, sorry for the delayed response. Do you mean moving boards? You can do move boards. What I would recommend is to create a folder in the original workspace, move boards into it and then move the folder at once
